sections.paragraph:
ἔκχυσις, εως, ἡ (s. ἐκχέω; Aristot. et al.; PTebt 86, 9 [II b.c.]; PLond III, 1177, 84 p. 183 [113 a.d.]; LXX; En 17:7) ‘outflow’ (as of bodies of water Aristot. Mete. 354a, 26; cp. Theophr., Vent. 50) in our lit. only fig. outpouring of the Holy Spirit 1 Cl 2:2 (w. ἐπί τινα as 3 Km 18:28).—Frisk s.v. χέω C4.

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

PLond PLond = PLondon=Greek Papyri in the British Museum—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

En En = I Enoch—List 2

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Theophr Theophr , IV–III b.c.—List 5

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

Frisk Frisk = HF., Griechisches etymologisches Wörterbuch—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 312
